title: acetosella geminata
intro: Acetosella geminata, also known as the cranberry or American cranberry, is a low-growing, evergreen shrub native to the wetlands of North America. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include its anti-inflammatory and astringent effects. The health benefits of Acetosella geminata include its ability to prevent or treat urinary tract infections (UTIs) by preventing bacteria from adhering to the bladder and urinary tract walls, as well as its potential to reduce the risk of kidney stones and other urinary tract issues. Acetosella geminata can be prepared into herbal supplements, teas, and juices for medicinal use.
